title: The Hockey Mod
description: Adds hockey sticks, pucks, nets, and ice rinks to Minecraft!
body:
Bring ice hockey to Minecraft! Craft a hockey stick and puck, then place a full
   NHL-style rink or a massive 10,000-seat arena with a single click. Skate
  across the ice, take possession of the puck, and rip slap shots and wrist shots
   at the goal. Features realistic puck physics with smooth sliding on ice and
  bouncing off boards, goal detection with automatic scoring, a game clock with 3
   periods, and a HUD scoreboard. Play with friends using LAN or the Essential
  mod. Includes villager fans that watch the action, locker rooms, concession
  stands, and a jumbotron. Craft rink ice, boards, goals, and more with
  survival-friendly recipes.
